title: Transitive dependency with CVE but no reachable path — suppressed to P3
violated_rule: No reachable P1 CVEs — all CVSS >= 7.0 reachable vulns addressed or waived
expected_feedback: P3 Low: CVE-2023-48795 in transitive dependency golang.org/x/crypto@v0.13.0. govulncheck source mode confirms no reachable path — the vulnerable ssh.ServerConfig function is not called. Track for next upgrade cycle. Not urgent.
